title: grammitis glandulifera
intro: Grammitis glandulifera is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Grammitis glandulifera include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it is also used to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Grammitis glandulifera can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice or cream to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
